title: Boston Data and AI Saturday 2026
description: Boston Data and AI Saturday 2026: https://dayofdata.org/2026-10-03-dayofdata1150/ Collab Days: Community-run events focused on tech. Primarily the Microsoft platform, but does not compete with other platforms and hosts sessions on other tech as well: https://www.collabdays.org/ Some are virtual! DevOps Days: https://devopsdays.org/ Resources
